Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide

fields.Description: Lunch break.

fields.Title: Afternoon tea
Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description: Afternoon tea break.

fields.Title: Breakout sessions (running concurrently)
Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description:
Breakout 1: Local needs and responses to climate change
Breakout 2: Using global forums to advance Indigenous rights
Breakout 3: Solidarity with mob in NT and Queensland.

fields.Title: Plenary: report-backs and reflections

fields.Title: Close Day 2

Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description:
Guest speaker via Zoom: Travis Lovett
Launching the Cubawee Redistribution Fund
Pitching campaign ideas to deep-dive in breakout sessions.

fields.Title: Morning tea - including Walk for Truth solidarity action
Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description: Morning tea and Walk for Truth solidarity action.

fields.Title: Breakout sessions: campaign collaborations (running concurrently)
Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description:
Together for Treaty campaign (Treaty and truth-telling)
The Answer is Us campaign (climate justice)
TBC: collaboration ideas arising from the room.

fields.Title: Lunch
Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description: Lunch break.

fields.Title: Breakout sessions: skills workshops (running concurrently)
Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description:
Workshop 1: Pitching and telling your story in the media
Workshop 2: Community organising skills
Workshop 3: Passing the Message Stick
Workshop 4: Fundraising skills
Workshop 5: Digital campaigning and social media.

fields.Title: Plenary closing session: Where to from here
Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description: Reflections from the room, what is next from Common Threads, and giving feedback while staying connected.

fields.Title: Formal program concludes, afternoon tea available
Venue Name: Adelaide Oval, War Memorial Drive, North Adelaide
fields.Description: Formal program concludes. Afternoon tea remains available, with an option for Thursday-night travellers to depart for the airport.

fields.Content Body:
Common Threads Summit is committed to a safe, inclusive and respectful environment for all participants.

We expect everyone to engage in good faith, listen respectfully and avoid harassment, discrimination or harmful conduct.

If you experience or witness a concern, contact the summit safety team immediately.

Use strong passwords and multi-factor authentication on devices used during summit days.

Do not share personal or sensitive details in public channels.

Report suspicious digital activity to summit crew straight away.
